name: Feature request
about: A new capability, a new agent role, or an improvement to an existing phase
labels: enhancement
---

<!-- One paragraph. What's missing or suboptimal? -->

## Which agent or phase does this affect

## What the current behaviour is

<!-- If this is an improvement to existing behaviour, describe what it does now. -->

## What the improved behaviour would look like

<!-- Be specific. If proposing a new agent, describe its role, scope, and "You do NOT" guardrails. -->

## Have you tested a workaround or prototype

<!-- If you've already tried something in your own fork, describe what you found. -->
